description: MCP server for IBM z/OS jobs, datasets, USS, and operational diagnostics via Zowe SDK.
name: io.github.NotHarshhaa/mainframe-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: z/OSMF hostname or IP address
environmentVariables.name: ZOSMF_HOST

environmentVariables.description: z/OSMF HTTPS port (default 443)
environmentVariables.name: ZOSMF_PORT

environmentVariables.description: Optional API gateway or mediation layer prefix for z/OSMF
environmentVariables.name: ZOSMF_BASE_PATH

environmentVariables.description: z/OS user id (required with ZOSMF_PASSWORD unless ZOSMF_TOKEN is set)
environmentVariables.name: ZOSMF_USER

environmentVariables.description: Password for basic auth (required with ZOSMF_USER unless ZOSMF_TOKEN is set)
environmentVariables.name: ZOSMF_PASSWORD

environmentVariables.description: Auth token (alternative to user/password)
environmentVariables.name: ZOSMF_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Token type when using ZOSMF_TOKEN (e.g. LTPA2)
environmentVariables.name: ZOSMF_TOKEN_TYPE

environmentVariables.description: Verify TLS certificates (true in production)
environmentVariables.name: ZOSMF_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED

environmentVariables.description: Log level: fatal, error, warn, info, debug, trace, silent
environmentVariables.name: LOG_LEVEL

environmentVariables.description: Transport: stdio (IDE) or sse (container/network)
environmentVariables.name: MCP_TRANSPORT

environmentVariables.description: Listen port when MCP_TRANSPORT=sse
environmentVariables.name: MCP_SSE_PORT

environmentVariables.description: Max lines returned from a single spool DD
environmentVariables.name: MAX_JOB_OUTPUT_LINES

environmentVariables.description: Max lines returned from dataset or USS reads
environmentVariables.name: MAX_DATASET_READ_LINES

environmentVariables.description: Max spool files fetched during diagnostics
environmentVariables.name: MAX_JES_SPOOL_FILES

environmentVariables.description: Max RACF audit log lines per query
environmentVariables.name: MAX_AUDIT_LINES

environmentVariables.description: CICSplex name or region APPLID (required for CICS tools)
environmentVariables.name: CMCI_CONTEXT

environmentVariables.description: CMCI hostname (defaults to ZOSMF_HOST)
environmentVariables.name: CMCI_HOST

environmentVariables.description: CMCI HTTPS port (default 1490)
environmentVariables.name: CMCI_PORT

environmentVariables.description: CMCI REST base path
environmentVariables.name: CMCI_BASE_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Db2 subsystem location name (required for Db2 tools)
environmentVariables.name: DB2_LOCATION

environmentVariables.description: Db2 REST hostname (defaults to ZOSMF_HOST)
environmentVariables.name: DB2_HOST

environmentVariables.description: Db2 REST port (default 50400)
environmentVariables.name: DB2_PORT

environmentVariables.description: Db2 REST base path
environmentVariables.name: DB2_BASE_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Optional SMF summary dataset for offline metrics
environmentVariables.name: SMF_SUMMARY_DATASET

environmentVariables.description: Query z/OSMF RMF metrics when available
environmentVariables.name: RMF_METRICS_ENABLED

environmentVariables.description: USS path to RACF audit log file
environmentVariables.name: RACF_AUDIT_USS_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Sequential dataset containing RACF audit records
environmentVariables.name: RACF_AUDIT_DATASET

environmentVariables.description: When true, blocks write tools such as submit_jcl
environmentVariables.name: SECURITY_READ_ONLY

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated allowlist of MCP tool names
environmentVariables.name: SECURITY_ALLOWED_TOOLS

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated blocklist of MCP tool names
environmentVariables.name: SECURITY_BLOCKED_TOOLS

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated dataset patterns (e.g. USERDEV.*,SYS1.*)
environmentVariables.name: SECURITY_ALLOWED_DATASET_PATTERNS

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated USS path prefixes
environmentVariables.name: SECURITY_ALLOWED_USS_PATHS

environmentVariables.description: Log every tool invocation to stderr (SIEM-friendly JSON)
environmentVariables.name: SECURITY_AUDIT_LOGGING

environmentVariables.description: Maximum inline JCL size for submit_jcl
environmentVariables.name: SECURITY_MAX_JCL_BYTES
